reference: My seven-month-old daughter has had diarrhea for two weeks solid now, up to eight-ten dirty diapers a day. I stopped solids as I thought it was linked, but that was a week ago and there is still no change. I have been to the doctor, but they have not been very helpful. They sent off a stool sample and I am still awaiting the results, and they gave cream for her burning bottom but haven't said what it could be.
text: My seven-month-old daughter has had diarrhea for two weeks solid now, up to 8-10 dirty diapers a day. I stopped solids as I thought it was linked, but that was a week ago and there is still no change. I have been to the doctor, but they have not been very helpful. They sent off a stool sample and I am still awaiting the results. And they gave cream for her burning bottom, but haven't said what it could be.
